Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.ElementType

Type of element.

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
Unknown

0

Element type is not defined.
Discussion

1

Discussion.
PictureWithDescription

2

Picture with description.
Folder

4

Folder.
Note

8

Note.
WebLink

32

Weblink.
FolderFile

64

File.
Survey

128

Survey.
Assignment

512

Assignment.
Lesson

2048

Lesson.
Test

65536

Test 2.0.
LearningToolElement

131072

Learning tool element (any element, which belongs to learning tool).
CustomActivity

524288

Custom activity.
LearningPath

1048576

Learning path.
